creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
No problem for me, but indeed I didn't expect to have to bother you so much.

Before the last patch I posted, I had set up a new jail with just the minimum packages, that's how I saw what to add. And I didn't have the failure you're reporting in the end, so there is something strange.

Going to look into it, and I'll post when I have something new.

I've not setup poudriere for years, but maybe it's time to do so again (but my time is quite limited).
